sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'S':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        key = 'left' if min(cols) < 30 else 'right'
        print(f"{key}: top-left=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})")

# Print maze structure to plan remaining moves
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nMaze (rows 9-30):")
for r in range(9, 31):
    row_str = ""
    for c in range(9, 54):
        ch = ascii_lines[r][c]
        if ch == 'B': row_str += '#'
        elif ch == 'S': row_str += 'S'
        elif ch == 'Y' or ch == 'O': row_str += '.'
        else: row_str += ch
    if '#' in row_str or 'S' in row_str:
        print(f"  {r:2d}: {row_str}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
